summary: The presenter demonstrates how to modify a fashion model's pose within the Astria AI platform. Starting from a pre-configured look, they click on the 'Pose' slot to open a selection modal. From the available options, they choose a 'back view' pose, which updates the main interface. Finally, they initiate the image generation process to create a new image incorporating the selected back view pose.
ui_state: Astria AI platform showing a grid of fashion item slots (Pose, Jacket, Footwear, Accessories, Background) and a Lookbook section with previous image generations and their prompts. A modal window for pose selection is opened and closed during the demonstration, followed by a loading screen for image generation.

interactions.target_description: A square slot labeled 'Pose' in the main grid, with a placeholder image of a woman's face.
interactions.outcome: A modal window titled 'Searching' appears, displaying various pose options as stick figures (front pose, all angle view, back view, front full body pose).

interactions.target_description: A text label 'back view' with a stick figure icon, listed as a pose option in the modal window.
interactions.outcome: The 'back view' pose is selected and appears in the 'Pose' slot in the main grid. The modal window closes. The prompt text below updates to include 'back view (pose)'.

interactions.target_description: A button labeled 'Generate' in the top right corner of the interface.
interactions.outcome: The main content area displays 'Searching' and then 'Loading' indicators, followed by the Lookbook view updating with a new image generation in progress.

notable_ui_affordances: Nano Banana 2 - Genesis 3.1 Flash Image Prom...
Add front, back, side (placeholder for Pose)
Add bag, hat, jewel (placeholder for Accessories)
Add jacket, pants, jacket (placeholder for Jacket)
Desaturation of blues and g (background description)
A low-angle shot, looking slightly up at the woman. (prompt for pose)
The texture of the dress fabric is visible, with subtle folds and creases. (prompt for tank top)
Here's the revised prompt, following your instructions: (prompt for jeans)
Desaturation of blues and greens in the background to enhance the focus on the subject. (prompt for background)
